mapper.select: select food_categories.id, food_categories.food_id, food_categories.category_id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image from collections left join food_categories on collections.target_id=food_categories.id where user_id=#{user_id} and collections.target_type=2
select * from collections left join routes on collections.target_id=routes.id where user_id= #{user_id} and collections.target_type=1
select * from collections left join scenics on collections.target_id=scenics.id where user_id= #{user_id} and collections.target_type=3
